metadata.description: Production-grade Claude Code skills for full-stack Django + React/TypeScript development. Enforces best practices: soft delete, audit fields, ORM optimisation, shared component library, memoization, and comprehensive testing.

plugins.name: django-react-dev
plugins.description: Full-stack orchestrator — Django REST Framework + React/TypeScript. End-to-end feature development from PRD to implementation.

plugins.name: django-backend-dev
plugins.description: Backend-only Django REST Framework skill. Models, serializers, views, filters, admin, soft delete, audit fields, ORM optimisation, pytest testing.

plugins.name: react-frontend-dev
plugins.description: Frontend-only React + TypeScript skill. Redux Toolkit, Axios JWT refresh, shadcn/ui, Tailwind, shared component library, memoization, Vitest testing.
